problem id: a2bb8c3a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(3)

examples:
  01000010 -> 00001000
  00010100 -> 00000010
  10111111 -> 00010111
  01110001 -> 00001110
  00011101 -> 00000011
  10110011 -> 00010110
  00100110 -> 00000100
  10000011 -> 00010000
  11100111 -> 00011100

query: 01101000
predicted answer: 00001101
